name: Great Powers
short_description: A 4x global turn-based strategy game with a well-developed economic and military model.
detailed_description:
A 4x global turn-based strategy game with a well-developed economic and military model.

- Control one of the Great Powers to gain dominance throughout the world. (England, France, Spain, Portugal, Italy, Prussia, Russia, Austria-Hungary, Ottoman Empire)

- A full-fledged economy: you need to develop infrastructure, build roads and warehouses in order to extract resources. From resources, produce goods for the construction of the army and navy.

- Developed diplomacy, declare war, make alliances, build embassies.

- Trade, produce expensive industrial goods from cheap resources that cost 10 times more.

- Control an army or fleet in battles, capture enemy provinces.

- Exploration of the New World, conquest of the Indians.

- World map based on real historical provinces of the old world of 48 states.

- Over 100 technologies to research from 1500 to 1900.

- Sophisticated AI that uses linear programming techniques and fuzzy sets to make decisions in specific situations.

To survive and become a powerful state, a real Great Power, many criteria must be taken into account:

- Size of territory and wealth of resources

- Development of infrastructure, what is the length of roads, how many warehouses, ports, enterprises

- The number of labor force and their skills. A master works 6 times more productively than a simple worker

- Size of army and navy

- Merchant fleet size

- Technological level

- Successful diplomacy, presence of allies

Only by forming a developed economy, trade, army and navy can we achieve sustainable development and protect our national interests around the world.

The game is inspired by the Imperialism 1-2 series of games. If you have already played them, you will be able to get used to it quite easily. This series is distinguished by its deep development of the economic, scientific and military model of the state and is considered one of the best 4X strategies in history.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Turkish*, Swedish*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
